name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Bonnie Adult Cat Food - Salmon 1.5kg
shortDescription: Specially made for grown cats, this salmon-based recipe delivers gentle, balanced nourishment without fillers. Its high fish-protein content keeps muscles firm and coats naturally glossy, while added nutrients help digestion and daily energy. Crafted with care for cats of every breed and lifestyle.
description: Bonnie Salmon Adult Cat food, full-balanced, salmon protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Fish meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and Oduor control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimises animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding manna oligsacharrides , beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat are supported by using brewer's yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. Rich fibre contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .. ...............32% Fat ..................... 12% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ...3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein (Fish), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Fish Meal, Corn Gluten, Fish Fat, Dried Sugar Beet, Fish Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
